dct_description_sm: Complete accounting of all incorporated cities, including the boundary and name of each individual city. Since 2009, this process includes digital capture of every annexation as they are sent to CAL FIRE from the state Board of Equalization. This service depicts incorporated cities with a simple outline symbology. An additional service with the standard hatched symbology is also available. The service represents the latest version of the data and is updated when a new version is released. As of November 2018, it represents incorp18_2.
